meaning: n.[桥牌] 累积赌注,累积奖金
examples: If the jackpot isn't won this week it will roll over again to next week.
This is now a question for Gloria MacKenzie, an 84-year-old widow who recently emerged from her small, tin-roofed house in Florida to collect the biggest undivided lottery jackpot in history.
Tennis player Michael Stich hit the jackpot yesterday when he won $2 million.
Still, the mere threat of a jackpot award makes defendants (or their insurers) eager to settle.
For farmers with good bull stock, like Van Tassell's brother Stephen, it's like hitting the jackpot.
